質問メッセージ = Use the ladder?
選択肢リスト = ["{\"label\":\"梯子を使う\",\"switchId\":\"\…
Some doors require switches to be operated to open.
\C[18]Switches of a color\C[0] open \C[18]doors of that color\C[0].
In addition to the regular controls, you can press the Q and E keys to
strafe. Q strafes left while E strafes right.
The \C[18]space bar\C[0] opens doors and chests, and also operates switches.
Select \C[18]Map\C[0] in the menu to open the map.
Clearing the map will be useful in clearing dungeons.
Choosing Auto Battle in combat will make you automatically attack the
enemy. However, it will only use \C[18]normal attacks\C[0].
Hold the Ctrl key, right click, or left click to cancel auto battle.
Winning battle grants experience, money, and item drops. When your
level increases, your stats go up and you earn \C[18]Skill Points\C[0].
Go to \C[18]Skill Tree\C[0] on the menu to spend your Skill Points and
\C[18]Ladders\C[0] can be used in dungeons to go to the next floor.
When you find a ladder, use it to advance. Torches guide the way.
